_comment: Regression test baseline. Updated by the regression-tester agent. Each key is a test name, value is {status, last_run, notes}.
_note: Full run against PepperTestApp on sim 905B3C10. CLI-only (no MCP tools available). Test app built and deployed successfully.

pepper connects.notes: ping returns pong, look returns screen data (19 interactive + 11 text elements on Controls tab)

look returns elements.notes: 19 interactive elements on Controls tab, well above 3 minimum

tap by text.notes: Tapped 'List' tab via text strategy, screen changed from Controls to List (title=List)

back navigation.notes: Navigated back from detail to List screen successfully

input text into field.notes: Tapped 'Enter text here' textField, input 'test input 123', verified value='test input 123' in subsequent look

dismiss keyboard.notes: No crash! PR #967 fix confirmed. Returns 'Invalid JSON' response but app stays alive and functional. Previously crashed.

scroll down.notes: Scrolled down 200pt successfully, content shifted to show text field and other elements

scroll to element.notes: scroll --element 'Date Picker' returns 'Element not found'. Off-screen elements not discoverable by scroll command.

look scope filtering.notes: look --scope 'Toggles' returns element_count=0 with SCOPE ERROR. Scope filtering doesn't match SwiftUI section headers.

look compact mode.notes: Skipped: compact mode only available via MCP tool (not in pepper-ctl CLI).

find by predicate.notes: Skipped: find command only available via MCP tool.

read element properties.notes: read command requires --id (accessibility ID). No elements in test app expose explicit accessibility IDs in look output.

appearance toggle.notes: CRASH: appearance command crashes app (WebSocket connection lost). Reproduced 2/2 times. Filed #974.

network monitoring.notes: Skipped: network commands only available via MCP tool.

network websocket log and status.notes: Skipped: requires MCP tools and test app WebSocket Client screen.

console capture.notes: Skipped: console commands only available via MCP tool. Raw JSON attempt crashed app similarly to appearance.

timeline flight recorder.notes: Skipped: timeline command only available via MCP tool.

vars inspect.notes: Skipped: vars_inspect command only available via MCP tool.

defaults read.notes: Skipped: defaults command only available via MCP tool.

snapshot save and diff.notes: snapshot returned 41 elements on Controls tab. Diff not tested (MCP-only).

accessibility audit.notes: Skipped: accessibility_audit command only available via MCP tool.

look on empty screen.notes: Look returns successfully on Misc tab (24 interactive, 26 text). No errors.

tap nonexistent element.notes: Returns clear error: 'Element not found by text: ... not found anywhere in the view hierarchy', no crash
